npcs.name: Third Hokage
dialogue: Your team has been fully healed.
Kakashi is waiting at the Training Grounds. Pass his bell test and your duties begin.
A C-rank request came from the Land of Waves.
Cross the Great Naruto Bridge — but be ready. Not every shinobi out there is a friend.
You fought well in the exams, Commander.
But keep an eye on Sasuke. Formidable power can curdle into something darker.
You brought him to a standstill — and brought yourself back too.
The Will of Fire burns brightest in you, Commander. One day, that hat may be yours.

npcs.name: Tool Shop Keeper
dialogue: Tags, pills, and steel — everything a Commander needs.

npcs.name: Ichiraku Teuchi
dialogue: One bowl of the usual? On the house.
Your whole squad looks livelier already!

npcs.name: Iruka Sensei
dialogue: Remember your basics: type advantage wins fights.
Fire burns Wind. Wind cuts Lightning. Lightning splits Earth. Earth dams Water. Water douses Fire.
Genjutsu (Yin) breaks Taijutsu (Yang), and Yang shatters Yin.

warps.label: Land of Waves
warps.locked_text: Kakashi: Pass the bell test at the Training Grounds before you take a real mission.

warps.label: Forest of Death
warps.locked_text: The Chunin Exams haven't opened yet. Finish the Land of Waves mission first.

warps.label: Exam Stadium
warps.locked_text: The Stadium finals open once you've survived the Forest of Death.

warps.label: Mount Myoboku
warps.locked_text: There's no reason to leave the village... yet.

warps.label: Valley of the End
warps.locked_text: Sasuke is somewhere past the Valley of the End — but the road there isn't open yet.
